steps.title: Subtract the equations
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first equation. The coefficients are designed to create $3x+3y$ directly:
$$
(8x-4y)-(5x-7y)=6-14
$$

steps.title: Simplify the result
steps.content: Combine like terms on the left and subtract on the right: $$ 3x+3y=-8 $$ The answer is B.
